title: Implement GitHub PR observer
goal: Implement the GitHub PR, check and review observer described in docs/plans/bureau-runtime-automation-baseline-v1.md as source-attributed evidence for Bureau runs.

metadata.safety_boundary: observation only; GitHub keeps PR, review and CI authority
metadata.outcome: Implemented the read-only GitHub PR observer with marker-first binding, weak branch fallback and fail-closed blocked/ambiguous observations (src/bureau/github_observer.py, CLI github-observe).

verified_acceptance.github-facts: observe_pull_requests emits state, is_draft, head_sha, checks, review_decision, merge_state, observed_at
verified_acceptance.confidence-and-ambiguity: branch fallback capped at 0.55; gh failure/ambiguity yield blocked/ambiguous, never success; fail-closed tests
verified_acceptance.tests: tests/test_github_observer.py covers marker match, branch fallback, no match, ambiguous match and stale observation

acceptance.assertion: Observer prefers explicit Bureau-Run and Bureau-Task markers before branch-name fallback.
Observed facts include PR state, draft state, head SHA, check state, review state, merge state and observation timestamp when available.
Branch fallback has lower confidence, and ambiguous or unavailable observations fail closed instead of becoming success.
Tests cover marker match, branch fallback, no match, ambiguous match and stale observation cases.
